title: After the Arima Kinen: My Miracle

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho puts in an amazing run and takes
first place. The sheer commitment to her
performance leaves the crowd quivering with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her peers utterly engrossed by Sweep
Tosho, Tokai Teio looks on with a slightly
frustrated, but ultimately happy expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She even praises Sweep Tosho's running,
acknowledging that it truly excited the audience.
